title: FATHIYA Session Workflow
summary: Defines the structured flow of a FATHIYA session from input through processing to artifact output, ensuring every session produces a traceable deliverable.
key_principles: Every session follows: input collection → classification → processing → artifact generation → receipt.
Session state is tracked through queue entries and receipt ledger records.
Multi-step sessions continue until a decision edge or artifact completion.
Session outputs are always linked to source provenance and batch metadata.
boundary: Workflow definition only. Does not trigger session execution or external actions.
